name: ExtensionSubscriptionStatus_Error
title: R5: List of errors on the subscription (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `SubscriptionStatus.error` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`SubscriptionStatus.error` 0..* `CodeableConcept`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `SubscriptionStatus.error` 0..* `CodeableConcept`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `SubscriptionStatus.error` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `SubscriptionStatus` is not mapped.
Element `SubscriptionStatus.error` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: List of errors on the subscription (new)
element.comment:
Element `SubscriptionStatus.error` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `SubscriptionStatus` is not mapped.
Element `SubscriptionStatus.error` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
Recommended practice: clear errors when status is updated.

element.short: List of errors on the subscription
element.definition: A record of errors that occurred when the server processed a notification.
element.comment: Recommended practice: clear errors when status is updated.

binding.description: Codes to represent subscription error details.
